results.rendered_html:
saṃvṛtta 1〉 adj. s. u. vart mit sam.
— 2〉 m.
a〉 N. pr. eines Schlangendämons  MBH. 5,3630 .
— b〉 ein N. Varuṇaʼs (vgl. saṃvṛta)  ŚABDAM. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
saṃvṛtta p. p.
1 Become, happened, occurred.
2 Fulfilled, accomplished.
3 Collected, heaped together
4 Past, gone.
5 Covered.
6 Furnished with.
— taḥ N. of Varuṇa.
